data.summary_suggestion: Update trunk configuration and settings
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing SIP trunk identified by its Sid. Allows modification of trunk properties such as friendly name, transfer settings, recording configuration, and associated credential lists or IP access control lists. Returns the updated trunk object with all current settings. Changes take effect immediately for new calls.

data.summary_suggestion: Create a new SIP trunk
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new SIP trunk for handling inbound and outbound calls. Requires a friendly name and optionally accepts transfer settings, recording configuration, credential lists, and IP access control lists. Returns the newly created trunk object with a unique Sid identifier. The trunk is immediately available for use in call routing.
